text.title: Cross-Tool Migration Basics Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this a single-team migration with <500 issues and <5 custom fields?

conclusion.verdict: Obtain source export before field-mapping work

branch.when: scope_fits == true AND export_available == true AND staging_run == false
scope_fits == true AND export_available == true AND staging_run == true

example.trace: scope_fits=true → export_available=true → staging_run=true → count-check passes → cutover.
